query: SELECT bookTitle, authorName, LEFT(coverImageUrl, 60) as coverUrl FROM book_profiles WHERE bookTitle IN ('Building Successful Partner Channels', 'Chasing Perfection', 'Great Game Business', 'No: The Only Negotiating System You Need', 'Sales Pitch', 'Sapiens', 'Thinking, Fast and Slow', 'Yes, And') ORDER BY bookTitle;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 46FBtXPMNF6LwZ8.root --database ehSrGoKN2NYhXg8UYLtWGw --execute SELECT bookTitle, authorName, LEFT(coverImageUrl, 60) as coverUrl FROM book_profiles WHERE bookTitle IN ('Building Successful Partner Channels', 'Chasing Perfection', 'Great Game Business', 'No: The Only Negotiating System You Need', 'Sales Pitch', 'Sapiens', 'Thinking, Fast and Slow', 'Yes, And') ORDER BY bookTitle;

rows.bookTitle: No: The Only Negotiating System You Need
